title: ricinocarpus angustifolius
intro: Ricinocarpus angustifolius, also known as the narrow-leaved ricinocarpus, is a plant species that belongs to the family Annonaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ricinocarpus angustifolius include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential side effects.
